CustomField.description: Number of days since this advisor was most recently marked Closed Lost (across all opps including Re-Engagement). Uses Account.Most_Recent_Closed_Date__c rollup (MAX Stage_Entered_Closed__c across all Closed Lost opps). Falls back to the opp's own Stage_Entered_Closed__c or CloseDate for accounts where the rollup is null (all Stage_Entered_Closed__c values are null on older records).
CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Lost"), TODAY() - DATEVALUE( IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Account.Most_Recent_Closed_Date__c)), Account.Most_Recent_Closed_Date__c, IF( ISBLANK(Stage_Entered_Closed__c), DATETIMEVALUE(TEXT(CloseDate) + " 00:00:00"), Stage_Entered_Closed__c ) ) ), NULL )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Days since this advisor was most recently closed lost. If the advisor was re-engaged and that also closed lost, this reflects the more recent date.
CustomField.label: Days Since Closed Lost
